response.justification: Despite a strong full-stack and open-source background, the candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation or secure systems; their C++ exposure is limited to a 6-month academic/thesis project over a decade ago, with no recent or professional work on high-performance, multi-threaded, or IEC 62443-compliant systems required for this role.
strengths: Extensive experience with event-driven architectures and message brokers via GISCollective and DLang projects.
Strong track record in mentoring, documentation, and technical workshops (e.g., Selenium, Testing RWGs).
Proven ability to deliver complex systems across embedded, web, and cloud environments with high ownership.
concerns: No recent or professional C++ development in the last 9+ years; core requirement of the role is unmet.
Lacks demonstrated experience with industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443-4-1) or SDL practices.
No exposure to industrial protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850) or IoT platforms in automation manufacturing context.
